About The Cyber Nest

The Cyber Nest is a trusted digital service centre located opposite Nayara Petrol Pump, Oyaira, Sono, Jamui. We provide more than 50 government, banking, insurance, travel and online services under one roof.

💻 50+ Digital Services
🛡️ CSC Authorized
🚆 IRCTC Authorized
🤝 Trusted Customer Support

Why locals come back

01

Genuine service

No shortcuts — every application goes through the correct official channel.

02

On-time delivery

Real timelines upfront, with follow-up so nothing sits unnoticed.

03

Friendly support

Ask in Hindi or English — we explain the form, fee and wait before you commit.

04

Affordable charges

Posted rates for every service — you know the cost before we start.
